app_name.context: Application name shown in titles and the about screen.

label_title.context: Field label for an asset's title.

label_artist.context: Field label for an asset's artist/author.

label_date.context: Field label for an asset's date.

label_dimensions.context: Field label for an asset's pixel dimensions.

label_medium.context: Field label for an artwork's medium (e.g. oil on canvas).

label_department.context: Field label for a museum/collection department.

label_repository.context: Field label for the holding repository/collection.

back.context: Navigation action that returns to the previous screen.

no_data_available.context: Empty-state message when a view has nothing to show.

error.auth.user_already_exists.message: An account with these details already exists.
error.auth.user_already_exists.context: High-level error for HTTP 409 on registration. Server sends code `error.auth.user_already_exists`; clients localize this message.

error.auth.invalid_credentials.context: High-level error for HTTP 401 on login. Server sends code `error.auth.invalid_credentials`.

error.auth.rate_limited.message: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
error.auth.rate_limited.context: High-level error for HTTP 429. Server sends code `error.auth.rate_limited`.
